---
title: "Titre de la présentation"
author: Auteur
# institute: "![](_extensions/hygeos/resources/assets/logo-Hygeos.png){height=120px}"
format: # pdf, docx, html, hygeos-docx, hygeos-pdf
    html
table-of-contents: true
number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Titre 1

Ce document a été produit à l'aide de Quarto [@allaire2022].

## Figures

![Exemple OLCI](https://developers.google.com/earth-engine/datasets/images/COPERNICUS/COPERNICUS_S3_OLCI_sample.png){#fig-olci}

Un exemple d'image OLCI est présenté en @fig-olci.

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

from _extensions.hygeos.utils import display_figure, display_markdown

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Sample data categories
categories = ["Alpha", "Beta", "Gamma"]

for cat in categories:
    # 1. Generate the Markdown Header
    display_markdown(f"## Figure {cat}")
    display_markdown(
        f'Cette figure (voir @fig-{cat}) illustre le cas "{cat}"'
    )

    # 2. Create the Plot
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
    y = np.sin(x * (categories.index(cat) + 1))
    ax.plot(x, y)
    ax.grid(True)

    display_figure(
        legend=f'Figure "{cat}".',
        label=f"#fig-{cat}",
    )
```

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
